institution.name: Inter American University of Puerto Rico-Bayamon

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 34% at Inter American University of Puerto Rico-Bayamon vs the 2003–2007 baseline (3.5k vs 5.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Inter American University of Puerto Rico-Bayamon fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Inter American University of Puerto Rico-Bayamon are 19% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($29.9k vs $25.1k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Inter American University of Puerto Rico-Bayamon rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (5.7% → 6.5%).
